body_excerpt: In NrmmMsgCodec::DecodeUPUTransparentContext of cn_NrmmDecoder.cpp, there is a possible out-of-bounds read due to memory corruption. This could lead to remote denial of service causing a communication processor crash with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In NrmmMsgCodec::DecodeUPUTransparentContext of cn_NrmmDecoder.cpp, there is a possible out-of-bounds read due to memory corruption. This could lead to remote denial of service causing a communication
